todos.content: Bind Modern minimal direction tokens + typography to :root
Design bookmark app layout: sidebar + main area + search + add dialog
Write index.html with real CSS tokens, layout, and JS behavior
Build interactive features: add bookmark, search/filter, delete, collection switching
Self-check: no generic icons, real placeholder data, no filler copy, no overflow
5-dim critique — fix any < 3/5
Emit <artifact>

<path>%USERPROFILE%\AppData\Roaming\Open Design\namespaces\release-stable-win\data\projects\proj-001\index.html</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: <!doctype html>
2: <html lang="en">
3: <head>
4: <meta charset="utf-8">
5: <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
6: <title>Collect — Bookmark manager</title>
7: <style>
8: :root {
9:   --bg:      oklch(99% 0.002 240);
10:   --surface: oklch(100% 0 0);
11:   --fg:      oklch(18% 0.012 250);
12:   --muted:   oklch(54% 0.012 250);
13:   --border:  oklch(92% 0.005 250);
14:   --accent:  oklch(58% 0.18 255);
15: 
16:   --font-display: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', system-ui, sans-serif;
17:   --font-body:    -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', system-ui, sans-serif;
18: 
19:   --sidebar-width: 220px;
20:   --radius-sm: 6px;
21:   --radius-md: 10px;
22: }
23: 
24: *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
25: 
26: html, body {
27:   width: 100%; height: 100%;
28:   overflow: hidden;
29:   background: var(--bg);
30:   color: var(--fg);
31:   font: 13.5px/1.5 var(--font-body);
32:   -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
33:   -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
34: }
35: 
36: /* ---- layout ---- */
37: .app { display: flex; height: 100vh; width: 100%; }
38: 
39: /* ---- sidebar ---- */
40: .sidebar {
41:   width: var(--sidebar-width);
42:   min-width: var(--sidebar-width);
43:   background: var(--surface);
44:   border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
45:   display: flex;
46:   flex-direction: column;
47:   padding: 16px 12px;
48:   gap: 4px;
49: }
50: 
51: .sidebar-heading {
52:   font: 600 11px/1.3 var(--font-body);
53:   letter-spacing: 0.06em;
54:   text-transform: uppercase;
55:   color: var(--muted);
56:   padding: 8px 10px 4px;
57: }
58: 
59: .collection {
60:   display: flex;
61:   align-items: center;
62:   gap: 8px;
63:   padding: 7px 10px;
64:   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
65:   cursor: pointer;
66:   font-size: 13px;
67:   color: var(--fg);
68:   transition: background 0.1s;
69:   border: none;
70:   background: transparent;
71:   width: 100%;
72:   text-align: left;
73:   font-family: inherit;
74: }
75: 
76: .collection:hover { background: var(--border); }
77: .collection.active {
78:   background: oklch(94% 0.03 255);
79:   color: oklch(35% 0.12 255);
80:   font-weight: 500;
81: }
82: 
83: .collection .count {
84:   margin-left: auto;
85:   color: var(--muted);
86:   font-size: 11px;
87:   font-feature-settings: "tnum";
88: }
89: 
90: .collection-icon { font-size: 15px; width: 20px; text-align: center; }
91: 
92: .sidebar-divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border); margin: 6px 0; }
93: 
94: /* ---- main ---- */
95: .main {
96:   flex: 1;
97:   display: flex;
98:   flex-direction: column;
99:   min-width: 0;
100: }
101: 
102: /* ---- toolbar ---- */
103: .toolbar {
104:   display: flex;
105:   align-items: center;
106:   gap: 12px;
107:   padding: 12px 20px;
108:   border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
109:   background: var(--surface);
110: }
111: 
112: .toolbar-title {
113:   font: 600 15px/1.3 var(--font-display);
114:   letter-spacing: -0.02em;
115:   white-space: nowrap;
116: }
117: 
118: .search-wrap {
119:   flex: 1;
120:   position: relative;
121:   max-width: 360px;
122: }
123: 
124: .search-wrap input {
125:   width: 100%;
126:   padding: 7px 12px 7px 32px;
127:   border: 1px solid var(--border);
128:   border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
129:   font: 13px/1.4 var(--font-body);
130:   background: var(--bg);
131:   color: var(--fg);
132:   outline: none;
133:   transition: border-color 0.15s;
134: }
135: 
136: .search-wrap input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }
137: 
138: .search-wrap::before {
139:   content: '';
140:   position: absolute;
141:   left: 10px;
142:   top: 50%;
143:   transform: translateY(-50%);
144:   width: 14px;
145:   height: 14px;
146:   border-radius: 50%;
147:   border: 1.5px solid var(--muted);
148:   opacity: 0.5;
149: }
150: 
151: .btn-primary {
152:   padding: 7px 16px;
153:   border: none;
